creator: kkonstan@duth.gr
text:
Cyrille Lefevre wrote:
>
> it's not so simple to just check about XFREE86_VERSION at compile time.
> 
> how do you handle this case for pre-build packages ?

Simple - You don't, since NO_PACKAGE is defined because it was agreed
that my original interpretation of the EULA wouldn't allow distribution
of any pre-build packages. Some people had a different opinion though,
and this was discussed briefly a few months ago... It's a shame since
it'd be very nice to have a webfonts package on the CD or even online.

> are you talking about getting rid of font.alias or about the -netscape-
> aliases ? I guess you are talking about the last one, no ?

I'm talking about getting rid of the -netscape- aliases, ie what you
did. However now I really remembered why I took that decision, and I
changed my mind... you see other apps shouldn't be forced to have the
8, 9 and 10pt sizes rendered as 11pt...

> to see if everything works fine, go there :
> 
>         http://www.joerg-pommnitz.de/TrueType/xfsft.html
> 
> then click on the first screenshot :-)

I did, everything looks fine, appart from this:

	http://www.joerg-pommnitz.de/TrueType/demo.html

Apparently we are missing some font sizes.

I'll do some more tests and if I have something quite different from
your patches I'll send you the patch to test it yourself.

--kkonstan
